# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a React application. Install Node.js, run npm install, build the production bundle with npm run build, and serve it with a lightweight HTTP server. Keep the Dockerfile simple and easy to understand for our team.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:14

# Set the working directory to /app
WORKDIR /app

# Copy the package.json file to the container
COPY package*.json ./

# Install the dependencies
RUN npm install

# Bundle the app source
RUN npm run build

# Expose the port that our app will listen on
EXPOSE 3000

# Run the lightweight HTTP server
CMD ["npm", "start"]
